eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Yakima, WA; at 10:36 AM on OCT 1, 2019 Effective until 11:36 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for Yakima County, Washington.  This system would bring you emergency alerts during an emergency.
